text: As I move through these stark, carefully designed spaces, I feel a sense of anticipation mixed with curiosity. The clean lines and glass barriers of the corridor invite a quiet sense of order, yet the blaze of color and interactive displays inside the R+D room beckon with the promise of new ideas. I feel both slightly distanced by the sterile precision and energized by the hints of creativity that burst from within. It is the paradox of innovation: boundaries hold potential, form containing the yet-to-be-formed.
